channel.title: LLM Timeline — Google DeepMind Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Google DeepMind.

item.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 3000B License: open Type: model Knowledge cutoff still=January 2025. Announce: https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-1-pro/

item.title: MedGemma 1.5 4B (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 4B License: open Type: model Lower MMLU score compared to previous MedGemma 1 27B (67.2 v 87). Announce: https://research.google/blog/next-generation-medical-image-interpretation-with-medgemma-15-and-medical-speech-to-text-with-medasr/

item.title: FunctionGemma (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 0.27B License: open Type: model "FunctionGemma, a specialized version of our Gemma 3 270M model tuned for function calling. It is designed as a strong base for further training into custom, fast, private, local agents that translate natural language into executable API actions."

item.title: T5Gemma 2 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 4B License: open Type: model Base model: Gemma 3. Dataset: Gemma 3 4B checkpoint (4T) + pretraining (2T)=6T.

item.title: Gemini 3 Flash (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: open Type: model Announce: https://deepmind.google/models/gemini/flash/

item.title: Gemini 3 Pro (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 3000B License: open Type: model "The knowledge cutoff date for Gemini 3 Pro was January 2025."

item.title: HOPE (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: partial Type: model "Combining our self-modifying sequence model with the continuum memory system, we present a learning module, called HOPE, showing promising results in language modeling, continual learning, and long-context reasoning tasks." Announce: https://research.google/blog/introducing-nested-learning-a-new-ml-paradigm-for-continual-learning/ May be released after paper is public.

item.title: Gemini Robotics 1.5 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: open Type: model 2. "vision-language-action (VLA) model turns visual information and instructions into motor commands for a robot to perform a task." Available to select partners.

item.title: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.5 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: open Type: model 1. "vision-language model (VLM) reasons about the physical world, natively calls digital tools and creates detailed, multi-step plans to complete a mission." Available to all devs.

item.title: VaultGemma (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1B License: open Type: model "Differential Privacy (DP) has emerged as the gold standard, providing a rigorous, mathematical framework to limit the influence of any single example in the training data on the resulting model. A model trained with DP provably bounds the reconstruction or leakage of information tied to individual data points." Announce: https://research.google/blog/vaultgemma-the-worlds-most-capable-differentially-private-llm/

item.title: Gemma 3 270M (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 0.27B License: open Type: model

item.title: T5Gemma (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 9B License: open Type: model Related paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.06225. Dataset was Gemma 2 9B on 8T tokens + 2T tokens adapted.

item.title: MedGemma 1 27B (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: open Type: model Multimodal model. Text MMLU score for med only=87.0.

item.title: Gemini Robotics On-Device (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: open Type: model See Mar/2025 Gemini Robotics-ER model for comparison. Announce: https://deepmind.google/discover/blog/gemini-robotics-on-device-brings-ai-to-local-robotic-devices/

item.title: Gemini 2.5 Pro 06-05 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 400B License: open Type: model "an upgraded preview of Gemini 2.5 Pro, our most intelligent model yet. Building on the version we released in May and showed at I/O, this model will be the generally available, stable version starting in a couple of weeks, ready for enterprise-scale applications."

item.title: DeepTransformers (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: closed Type: model "Atlas, a long-term memory module with high capacity that learns to memorize the context by optimizing the memory based on the current and past tokens, overcoming the online nature of long-term memory models. Building on this insight, we present a new family of Transformer-like architectures, called DeepTransformers, that are strict generalizations of the original Transformer architecture."

item.title: Atlas (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1.3B License: closed Type: model "Atlas, a long-term memory module with high capacity that learns to memorize the context by optimizing the memory based on the current and past tokens, overcoming the online nature of long-term memory models. Building on this insight, we present a new family of Transformer-like architectures, called DeepTransformers, that are strict generalizations of the original Transformer architecture."

item.title: Gemini Diffusion (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 40B License: open Type: model "Gemini Diffusion’s external benchmark performance is comparable to much larger models [like Gemini-2.0-Flash-Lite], whilst also being faster."

item.title: Gemma 3n (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 4B License: open Type: model Matryoshka Transformer or MatFormer model architecture. 850M (696M / 620M / 582M).

item.title: Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 80B License: open Type: model Context in=1M, out=64k. Knowledge cutoff Jan/2025. Codename 'nebula'. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: DolphinGemma (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 0.4B License: open Type: model "trained on Atlantic spotted dolphin sounds, we anticipate its potential utility for researchers studying other cetacean species, like bottlenose or spinner dolphins... Developed by Google, this AI model makes use of specific Google audio technologies: the SoundStream tokenizer efficiently represents dolphin sounds, which are then processed by a model architecture suited for complex sequences. This ~400M parameter model is optimally-sized to run directly on the Pixel phones WDP uses in the field."

item.title: Sec-Gemini v1 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 400B License: open Type: model "Sec-Gemini v1 achieves this by combining Gemini’s advanced capabilities with near real-time cybersecurity knowledge and tooling. This combination allows it to achieve superior performance on key cybersecurity workflows, including incident root cause analysis, threat analysis, and vulnerability impact understanding."

item.title: Agentic-Tx (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 400B License: open Type: model "a therapeutics-focused agentic system powered by Gemini 2.0 Pro. Agentic-Tx is equipped with 18 tools, including: TxGemma as a tool for multi-step reasoning"

item.title: TxGemma (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: open Type: model "a suite of efficient, generalist large language models (LLMs) capable of therapeutic property prediction as well as interactive reasoning and explainability. Unlike task-specific models, TxGemma synthesizes information from diverse sources, enabling broad application across the therapeutic development pipeline."

item.title: Gemini 2.5 Pro Preview (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 400B License: open Type: model Context in=1M, out=64k. Knowledge cutoff Jan/2025. HLE SOTA. Codename 'nebula'. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Gemini Robotics (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model Gemini 2.0 Pro (cloud). "The second model is Gemini Robotics, a state-of-theart Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model that connects strong embodied reasoning priors to dexterous low-level control of real-world robots to solve challenging manipulation tasks. As a generalist VLA, Gemini Robotics can perform a wide array of diverse and complicated tasks, while also closely following language guidance and generalizing to distribution shifts in instructions, visuals, and motions. To emphasize the flexibility and generality of the Gemini Robotics models, we also introduce an optional specialization stage, which demonstrates how Gemini Robotics can be adapted for extreme dexterity, for advanced reasoning in difficult generalization settings, and for controlling completely new robot embodiments."

item.title: Gemini Robotics-ER (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: closed Type: model Gemini 2.0 Flash (on device). "The first model is Gemini Robotics-ER, a VLM with strong embodied reasoning capabilities at its core, exhibiting generalization across a wide range of embodied reasoning tasks while also maintaining its core foundation model capabilities. Gemini Robotics-ER exhibits strong performance on multiple capabilities critical for understanding the physical world, ranging from 3D perception to detailed pointing to robot state estimation and affordance prediction via code."

item.title: Gemma 3 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: open Type: model Trained on 1T more tokens than Gemma 2. "introduces vision understanding abilities, a wider coverage of languages and longer context – at least 128K tokens."

item.title: Gemini 2.0 Pro (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: open Type: model Context=2M. Disappointing benchmarks, this is the 'pro' (medium) not 'ultra' (large) model. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Gemini 2.0 Flash exp (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: open Type: model Gemini 2.0 Flash was first model released, 11/Dec/2024. "New Modalities: Gemini 2.0 introduces native image generation and controllable text-to-speech capabilities" Announce: https://blog.google/technology/google-deepmind/google-gemini-ai-update-december-2024/ Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Gemini-1.5-Pro-002 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: open Type: model Sparse MoE. Context window=2M. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Data-Gemma (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: open Type: model RAG/RIG: "the LLM is fine-tuned to produce natural language Data Commons queries alongside statistics"

item.title: Gemini 1.5 Flash-8B (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model Announce: https://x.com/OfficialLoganK/status/1828480085353234535 1M context for all modalities. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: FLAMe (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 24B License: closed Type: model LLM-as-a-Judge autorater. Foundational Large Autorater Models (FLAMe). Uses an instruction-tuned PaLM-2-24B model. Unrelated to Microsoft FLAME Jan/2023.

item.title: Gemma 2 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: open Type: model Announce: https://blog.google/technology/developers/google-gemma-2/

item.title: LearnLM (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1500B License: partial Type: model Fine-tuned + prompted Gemini (Dec/2023). "The results of LearnLM-Tutor reproduce the performance of Gemini Pro, for example an MMLU score of 0.72 and MATH score of 0.33."

item.title: Gemini 1.5 Flash (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model 1M context length. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Med-Gemini-L 1.0 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model Med-Gemini-M 1.0 and Med-Gemini-L 1.0 (Pro and Ultra finetunes) "For language tasks that require less complex reasoning, such as summarizing medical notes and creating referral letters, we introduce Med-Gemini-M 1.0 by fine-tuning the Gemini 1.0 Pro model. For other tasks that require more advanced reasoning, we introduce Med-Gemini-L 1.0 by fine-tuning the Gemini 1.0 Ultra model using a self-training method to enable the models to efficiently use web search."

item.title: Hawk (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model MMLU=35. RNN.

item.title: Griffin (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 14B License: open Type: model MMLU=49.5. RNN.

item.title: Gemma (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model MMLU=64.3 (Llama 2 70B=68.9, ChatGPT 20B=70). Text only. Probably dense. Largest trained dataset (6T) besides frontier models.

item.title: Gemini 1.5 Pro (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: open Type: model Sparse MoE. Context window=1M and 10M for research. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: MedLM (Google DeepMind)
item.description: License: partial Type: model Available to 'white-listed' orgs only.

item.title: Gemini Ultra 1.0 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 1500B License: open Type: model Original MMLU=83.7. MMLU=90.04 with prompting. Chinchilla (20:1), dense, maybe 600B-2000T. Note: Gemini outputs are watermarked. I do not use GDM models. https://lifearchitect.ai/watermarking/

item.title: Q-Transformer (Google DeepMind)
item.description: License: closed Type: model Robotics, builds on RT-1

item.title: Mirasol3B (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: closed Type: model Combiner + autoregressive transformer for video/audio/text

item.title: MatFormer (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 0.85B License: open Type: model Matryoshka Transformer or MatFormer model architecture. 850M (696M / 620M / 582M). "850M decoder-only MatFormer language model (MatLM) allows us to extract multiple smaller models spanning from 582M to 850M parameters, each exhibiting better validation loss and one-shot downstream evaluations than independently trained counterparts."

item.title: PaLI-3 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 5B License: closed Type: model VLM. Next iteration of PaLI via Pathways. https://lifearchitect.ai/pathways/

item.title: RT-X (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 55B License: open Type: model Robotics using UL2. 'RT-1 model trained using the robotic data mixture as RT-1-X, and the RT-2 model trained using the robotic data mixture as RT-2-X.'

item.title: Med-PaLM M (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model Uses PaLM 1. Already outperformed by Med-PaLM 2. Med-PaLM Multimodal (Med-PaLM M).

item.title: DIDACT (Google DeepMind)
item.description: License: closed Type: model Iterative coding model trained on Google's monorepo. Jacob: https://twitter.com/jacobaustin132/status/1663972128176128002

item.title: Med-PaLM 2 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 340B License: closed Type: model Recently, our next iteration, Med-PaLM 2, consistently performed at an “expert” doctor level on medical exam questions, scoring 85%. This is an 18% improvement from Med-PaLM’s previous performance and far surpasses similar AI models.

item.title: Med-PaLM 1 (Google DeepMind)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model Collab between Google & DeepMind. Makes 1% less errors than humans
